content: You don't have sufficient permissions. Please contact the payer (<1>{{payerContact}}</1>) to access and configure the services.

comment.text: This key displays an error message informing the user they lack the necessary permissions to access or configure services. It appears in the ServicesItems component within the Portal Settings, specifically when permission restrictions are encountered. The message instructs the user to contact the payer, providing their contact information via a dynamic field.
